scripts.render:webm:1920: remotion render src/index.ts DashboardPreview1920 out/dashboard-preview-1920.webm --codec=vp9 --crf=16 && ffmpeg -y -i out/dashboard-preview-1920.webm -an -c:v copy out/dashboard-preview-1920.video-only.webm && mv out/dashboard-preview-1920.video-only.webm out/dashboard-preview-1920.webm
scripts.render:webm:1280: remotion render src/index.ts DashboardPreview1280 out/dashboard-preview-1280.webm --codec=vp9 --crf=18 && ffmpeg -y -i out/dashboard-preview-1280.webm -an -c:v copy out/dashboard-preview-1280.video-only.webm && mv out/dashboard-preview-1280.video-only.webm out/dashboard-preview-1280.webm
scripts.render:mp4:1920: remotion render src/index.ts DashboardPreview1920 out/dashboard-preview-1920.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=16 --x264-preset=slow && ffmpeg -y -i out/dashboard-preview-1920.mp4 -an -c:v copy out/dashboard-preview-1920.video-only.mp4 && mv out/dashboard-preview-1920.video-only.mp4 out/dashboard-preview-1920.mp4
scripts.render:mp4:1280: remotion render src/index.ts DashboardPreview1280 out/dashboard-preview-1280.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=18 --x264-preset=slow && ffmpeg -y -i out/dashboard-preview-1280.mp4 -an -c:v copy out/dashboard-preview-1280.video-only.mp4 && mv out/dashboard-preview-1280.video-only.mp4 out/dashboard-preview-1280.mp4
scripts.render:all: pnpm render:webm:1920 && pnpm render:webm:1280 && pnpm render:mp4:1920 && pnpm render:mp4:1280 && pnpm render:poster
scripts.sync:landing:profiles: cp out/dashboard-preview-1920.webm ../../app-landing/public/dashboard-preview-1920.webm && cp out/dashboard-preview-1280.webm ../../app-landing/public/dashboard-preview-1280.webm && cp out/dashboard-preview-1920.mp4 ../../app-landing/public/dashboard-preview-1920.mp4 && cp out/dashboard-preview-1280.mp4 ../../app-landing/public/dashboard-preview-1280.mp4 && cp out/dashboard-poster.jpg ../../app-landing/public/dashboard-poster.jpg
